title: What if Adam and the Angels were The Thing
display_title: What if Adam and the Angels were The Thing
wikitext:
[]: What if Adam and the Angels were "The Thing"             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sat Jan 02, 2010 1:18 pm The Thing, a monster from the short story "Who Goes there" and the 1982 movie by John Carpenter "The Thing" staring Kurt Russel. It is a creature that imitates other lifeforms. What if Adam itself and the angels were infected by The Thing before second impact, or even better yet, what if the angels (sans Koworu) are actually humans who are infected by the thing, and have changed. This would explain how the Angels would have the same DNA as us, as it'd be imitation. What if NERV can measure the contamination by the Thing and calls it "Mental Contamination". Anyone who is The Thing would be safe from third impact....and Gendo was never shown getting tanged.....Gendo must also be infected.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:41 pm my god Evangelion would have been REALLY scary if that was the case not to mention that it would be several episodes shorter than the actual series, as well as the constant death of cast members by being "assimilated"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:33 pm Yes, Eva would have been terrifying. Other then that, not really sure just how things would have played out.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 02, 2010 4:17 pm maybe Seele had been "The Thing" in this version & that all they're doing is now trying to spread a worldwide assimilation not even the poor Evangelions would have been safe

Article: What if Adam and the Angels were The Thing
[]: What if Adam and the Angels were "The Thing"             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sat Jan 02, 2010 1:18 pm The Thing, a monster from the short story "Who Goes there" and the 1982 movie by John Carpenter "The Thing" staring Kurt Russel. It is a creature that imitates other lifeforms. What if Adam itself and the angels were infected by The Thing before second impact, or even better yet, what if the angels (sans Koworu) are actually humans who are infected by the thing, and have changed. This would explain how the Angels would have the same DNA as us, as it'd be imitation. What if NERV can measure the contamination by the Thing and calls it "Mental Contamination". Anyone who is The Thing would be safe from third impact....and Gendo was never shown getting tanged.....Gendo must also be infected.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:41 pm my god Evangelion would have been REALLY scary if that was the case not to mention that it would be several episodes shorter than the actual series, as well as the constant death of cast members by being "assimilated"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:33 pm Yes, Eva would have been terrifying. Other then that, not really sure just how things would have played out.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 02, 2010 4:17 pm maybe Seele had been "The Thing" in this version & that all they're doing is now trying to spread a worldwide assimilation not even the poor Evangelions would have been safe
